featureName: Feature execution proof source of truth

serviceLevels.userVisibleCapability: Product owners can see proof state for every current scenario.
serviceLevels.sliMeasurementSource: feature-execution.contract.v1.json and promoted proof body scenario list

serviceLevels.userVisibleCapability: Product-facing proof facts are backed by canonical JSON proof.
serviceLevels.sliName: report facts backed by JSON percentage
serviceLevels.sloTarget: 100 percent of timing, call count, receipt, service-level, and promotion facts backed by JSON proof

serviceLevels.userVisibleCapability: A proven feature has a durable source-controlled proof body.
serviceLevels.sloTarget: committed proof body exists, cites selected proof run id, and matches current source hashes
serviceLevels.productOwnerDecision: blocking for proven or promoted claims

serviceLevels.userVisibleCapability: Version control remains small and reviewable.
serviceLevels.sloTarget: zero raw run evidence or archive artifacts committed
